phrases.intent_en: Ask where the costume display is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde puedo ver la exhibición de trajes?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿DOHN-deh PWEH-doh vehr lah ehks-hee-bee-SYOHN deh TRAH-hehs?

likely_response.local: Sala dos, al fondo a la derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: SAH-lah DOHS AHL FOHN-doh AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: Room two, at the back on the right.

responses.english: Room two, at the back on the right.
responses.phonetic: SAH-lah DOHS AHL FOHN-doh AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
responses.french: Sala dos, al fondo a la derecha.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to join guided tour
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿cómo puedo apuntarme a una visita guiada?
phrases.pronunciation: boo-EH-nohs DÍ-ahs KÓ-moh poo-EH-doh ah-poon-TAHR-meh AH OO-nah bee-SEE-tah g-ee-AH-dah

likely_response.translation_en: At the ticket office, 30 minutes before.

responses.english: At the ticket office, 30 minutes before.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the main exhibition hall is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿podría indicarme la sala principal?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, poh-DREE-ah een-dee-KAHR-meh lah SAH-lah prin-see-PAHL?

likely_response.local: Siga recto, está justo al entrar.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-gah REHTH-toh EHSTÁ HOO-stoh AHL ehnt-RAHR
likely_response.translation_en: Go straight, it is right upon entering.

responses.english: Go straight, it is right upon entering.
responses.phonetic: SEE-gah REHTH-toh EHSTÁ HOO-stoh AHL ehnt-RAHR
responses.french: Siga recto, está justo al entrar.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the memorabilia shop is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde vende recuerdos del museo?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿DOHN-deh BEN-deh reh-koo-EHR-dohs del moo-SEH-oh?

likely_response.local: Junto a la taquilla, al salir del Patio
likely_response.pronunciation: HOON-toh AH LAH tah-k-EEL-lah AHL sah-LEER DEHL pah-TEE-oh
likely_response.translation_en: At the exit, next to the register.

responses.english: At the exit, next to the register.
responses.phonetic: HOON-toh AH LAH tah-k-EEL-lah AHL sah-LEER DEHL pah-TEE-oh
responses.french: Junto a la taquilla, al salir del Patio
